title: autonomous trading
author: ok-hacker
selftext:
Hey guys,  
I'm running a bit of a research now on trading agents.

Could you please share the best platforms you know?  
I'm looking for something that is easy to confiugre. 100% autonomous is a bonus.

I don't mind the asset class (crypto/stocks).

Thanks

comments.author: Alone-Ad2836
comments.body: I'm going to open an account at Robin Hood, I've heard nothing but good things about their platform. Weebullis pretty good. Forget E trade and Charles Schwab. Although Think or Swim, is a great platform. I just use it for guidance. Robin hunts the most progressive one lately

comments.author: Alone-Ad2836
comments.body: I thought I responded apparently I'm not allowed to post yet or something. If this post I hope. I had said that for your purposes probably Robin Hood is the best and they are the most active and upgrading their platform. I have a Webull account That's pretty good also.. Forget Charles Schwab, except they bought TD think or swim platform which is really good.

replies.author: Alone-Ad2836
replies.body:
I'm not really sure, I know they do on cryptos, but I don't play crypto either anymore. You would have to call them to verify if they have it for Stocks and ETFs 
But they seem to be a really progressive firm.
 I wish I would have bought HOOD when it was $20 a share of course.

replies.author: ok-hacker
replies.body: I saw only DCA and buy automations. but nothing like auto pilot mode

comments.author: ok-hacker
comments.body: Robin Hood got auto pilot mode?!

comments.author: ThebobostorePakistan
comments.body: Try SmartEdge, professional people, plus a month free trial which no one offers in current mareket conditions. Look for it at smartedgetrading.net

replies.author: Alone-Ad2836
replies.body: Nice recommendation, does SmartEdge use AI?

replies.author: ThebobostorePakistan
replies.body: No, it's not dumb, actually it's a good question. The answer is i dont know 🤪 because i dont have access to the core of the EA, I deploy it and its working pretty good. You can ask them.

comments.author: Brilliant-Factor9416
comments.body: What platform let's you daytrade for free

comments.author: Hot-Year304
comments.body: Dont just look into a platform that has trading bots. Fundamentally understanding the approach the bot is taking and the win-conditions are essential for making sustainable, long term profits.

replies.author: ok-hacker
replies.body: but I'm looking for something that I do not need to monitor

comments.author: StevenVinyl
comments.body:
Look into [https://www.cod3x.org/](https://www.cod3x.org/), it's literally vibetrading. I wish I could post a screenshot here, or a vid.   
Lot's of examples on twitter as well, including live shows of how the product works, fully no-code, ez-mode.

comments.author: AttitudeGrouchy33
comments.body: milo is by far the best in the game, run fully autonomous on the solana chain  .....  you should all give it a try, use my ref to get access . [https://app.andmilo.com/?code=@marooned](https://app.andmilo.com/?code=@marooned)

replies.author: ok-hacker
replies.body:
This system is amazing!   
Easy to onboard and just do all the work for me!

But good to note that it's only crypto right there. But still works exactly as I imagined it

replies.author: Chemical-Current6047
replies.body: What was this system? Comment was deleted

replies.author: ok-hacker
replies.body: it was [app.andmilo.com](http://app.andmilo.com) , this shit is crazy!

comments.author: laradclark
comments.body:
Hello! We can guide you through our platform. Exness is a trusted platform that has a 4.8 rating on trustpilot where you can confidently trade. If you would be interested I am more than happy to help you.

you can register using our link: [https://my.exness.com/a/](https://my.exness.com/a/) 

Please contact me for further guidence.

Have a lovely day!

comments.author: freshmuse
comments.body: I keep saying this, sounds liek a broke disc, automation and agents helps, but it’s not a cheat code, you’re just swapping one set of problems for another. Try Coinrule, Cryptohopper and the others, they help a lot but still you have to know what you are doing
